description:
Configure an automated weekly status report in ManageEngine ServiceDesk Plus with the following settings:

- Schedule Name: Weekly Executive Summary
- Report to Send: 'Open Requests'
- Format: PDF
- Recipient Email: director@example.com
- Subject: Weekly Open Ticket Status
- Message: Attached is the status report for the weekly staff meeting.
- Frequency: Weekly on Mondays at 08:00 (8:00 AM)
